name: @cradleapp/aghub
description: Mirror AGHub inference providers into Cradle.

cradle.description: Use the model providers you manage in AGHub from Cradle.

capabilities.label: AGHub model providers
capabilities.description: Mirrors AGHub inference providers as Cradle external providers.

permissions.label: Read AGHub provider metadata
permissions.description: Reads AGHub's local inference-provider database without changing it.

permissions.label: Connect to a configured local AGHub API
permissions.description: Optionally reads API keys through an AGHub API endpoint you explicitly configure.
